title: U.S. payrolls rose by 178,000 in March, more than expected; unemployment at 4.3%
summary_full: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
summary_public: Nonfarm payrolls were expected to increase by 59,000 in March, with the unemployment rate holding at 4.4%.
